---
title: "cake analogy"
format: revealjs
---

## The cake analogy again

![](media/contrast_cake_01.png){.absolute width=500 left=0 top="100"}

::: fragment

![](media/contrast_cake_02.png){.absolute width=250 left=100 top="350"}
![](media/contrast_cake_arrow_02.png){.absolute width=75 left=150 top="350"}

:::
::: fragment

![](media/contrast_cake_03.png){.absolute width=250 left=350 top="350"}
![](media/contrast_cake_arrow_03.png){.absolute width=150 left=300 top="280"}

:::
::: fragment

![](media/contrast_cake_04.png){.absolute width=250 left=600 top="350"}
![](media/contrast_cake_arrow_04.png){.absolute width=250 left=500 top="245"}

:::
